summary: tier1_factors does not carry stablecoin/native flow breakdown. Requires PR-1c (writer extension) or transaction-level backfill — see H12 header for remediation paths.
remediation: PR-1c: extend compute-signals tier1_factors writer to include stablecoinSellVol / nativeSellVol / stablecoinShare. Wait 4 weeks for data, then implement H12 properly.
Backfill: walk transactions table per signal_id, classify token_symbol as stablecoin (USDT/USDC/DAI/BUSD/TUSD/FDUSD/PYUSD) or native, aggregate to per-signal share.
